debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∀ (H : Graph α β), H.IsCompOf G → ∃! x, x ∈ H.vertexSet ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)

failed_attempts:
classical
  by_cases hV : V(G).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hV
    obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h v
    exact ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH => sorry⟩
  · push_neg at hV
    refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp, fun e f he => by simp at he⟩, fun H hH => ?_⟩
    simp only [edgeVertexSet_empty, mem_empty_iff_false, not_false_eq_true, and_true]
    have : V(H) = ∅ := by
      ext x
      simp only [mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false]
      intro hx
      exact hV (hH.subset_vertex hx)
    simp [this]

classical
  obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)
  by_cases hV : V(G).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hV
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hvM'⟩ := h v
    use M'
    constructor
    · exact hM'.toIsMatching
    · intro H hH
      sorry
  · push_neg at hV
    use ∅
    refine ⟨⟨by simp, fun e f he _ _ ↦ (not_mem_empty e he).elim⟩, ?_⟩
    intro H hH
    simp only [vertexSetEdges_empty, mem_empty_iff_false, not_false_eq_true, and_true]
    have : V(H) = ∅ := by
      ext x
      simp only [mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false]
      intro hx
      exact hV (hH.vertex_subset hx)
    simp [this]

classical
  by_cases hne : Nonempty α
  · obtain ⟨M, hMmax, _⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)
    refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, fun H hH => ?_⟩
    sorry
  · push_neg at hne
    refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp, fun e f he => False.elim (Set.not_mem_empty e he)⟩, fun H hH => ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_empty_iff_false, not_false_eq_true, and_true]
    obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hH.nonempty
    exact False.elim (hne ⟨v⟩)

-- The proof follows from the matroid structure established above
  -- Each component's vertices form a series class, so by Matroid.fooA,
  -- the rank of each component is |V(C)| - 1, meaning exactly one vertex is unmatched
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hmax⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    classical
    by_cases hE : G.EdgeFinite
    · sorry -- exists by finiteness
    · sorry -- handle infinite case
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH => ?_⟩
  sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM, hmax⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    sorry
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH => ?_⟩
  sorry

classical
  by_cases hne : V(G) = ∅
  · use ∅
    constructor
    · exact ⟨by simp, fun e f he _ _ ↦ (not_mem_empty e he).elim⟩
    · intro H hH
      simp only [edgeSetSpan_empty, not_mem_empty, and_true]
      have : V(H) ⊆ V(G) := hH.toIsSubgraph.vertex_subset
      rw [hne] at this
      simp only [subset_empty_iff] at this
      exact ⟨Classical.arbitrary α, by simp [this], fun y hy ↦ by simp [this] at hy⟩
  · push_neg at hne
    obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne
    obtain ⟨M, hMmax, _⟩ := h v
    use M, hMmax.toIsMatching
    intro H hH
    sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)
  by_cases hne : V(G).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hne
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hvM'⟩ := h v
    exact ⟨M', hM'.toIsMatching, fun H hH => by
      have hser : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b := by
        intro a ha b hb hab
        exact matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h (hH.connected.adj_of_mem ha hb hab)
      sorry⟩
  · push_neg at hne
    simp only [Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x => hne x)] at *
    exact ⟨∅, ⟨Set.empty_subset _, fun e f he => False.elim (Set.not_mem_empty e he)⟩, 
      fun H hH => False.elim (hne (hH.nonempty.some) hH.nonempty.some_mem)⟩

-- The proof relies on the matching matroid structure
  -- Every pair of adjacent vertices is a series pair (by matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj)
  -- By transitivity, all vertices in a component form a series class
  -- By Matroid.fooA, the rank contribution from each component leaves exactly one vertex unmatched
  -- A maximum matching achieves this, avoiding exactly one vertex per component
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hmax⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    sorry -- existence of maximum matching
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH => ?_⟩
  sorry

classical
  obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)
  by_cases hV : V(G).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := hV
    obtain ⟨M₀, hM₀, hvM₀⟩ := h v
    use M₀, hM₀.toIsMatching
    intro H hH
    sorry
  · push_neg at hV
    use ∅
    constructor
    · exact ⟨fun _ h => h.elim, fun _ _ h => h.elim⟩
    · intro H hH
      exfalso
      have := hH.nonempty
      simp only [Set.nonempty_def] at this
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
      exact hV ⟨x, hH.sub.1 hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hMmax, _⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α) |>.choose_spec |>.choose_spec
    |> fun _ => ⟨∅, (⟨fun _ h => h.elim, fun _ _ h => h.elim⟩ : G.IsMatching ∅), by simp⟩
  sorry
